mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_role ORDER BY role_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role (role_name, role_code, description, status) VALUES (#{roleName}, #{roleCode}, #{description}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_role SET role_name=#{roleName}, role_code=#{roleCode}, description=#{description}, status=#{status} WHERE role_id=#{roleId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_role WHERE role_code = #{roleCode}
